ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Continued To Jan-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Sauers for Joseph Weinstein and Susan Weinstein (Co-Administrators).

Mr. Sauers stated that adminstration of the Estate was nearly completed, that the Estate tax return had been filed and that he expected to file the Petition for Final Distribution within sixty days. The matter was continued to January 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
